---
title: "Repository Structure"
format: html
---

# Repository map

This page is a current-owner map for the repo surfaces that explain, execute,
and validate Aria-NBV. It is intentionally narrower than a full directory dump:
the goal is to point you at the files that own the live contracts.

::: {.callout-note title="Source anchors"}
- App shell: [`NbvStreamlitApp`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/app.py#L79), [`PipelineController`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/controller.py#L34)
- Data surface: [`AseEfmDataset`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_dataset.py#L320), [`EfmSnippetView`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_views.py#L479), [`VinSnippetView`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_views.py#L796)
- Oracle pipeline: [`OracleRriLabeler`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/pipelines/oracle_rri_labeler.py#L80), [`CandidateViewGenerator`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/pose_generation/candidate_generation.py#L319), [`CandidateDepthRenderer`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rendering/candidate_depth_renderer.py#L108), [`OracleRRI`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/rri_metrics/oracle_rri.py#L34)
- VIN surface: [`VinModelV3`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/model_v3.py#L256), [`EvlBackboneOutput`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/types.py#L21), [`VinPrediction`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/types.py#L200)
:::

## Workspace roots

```text
.
├── AGENTS.md                    # Repo-wide guidance and bootstrap order
├── .agents/                     # Canonical state, debriefs, references, and skills
├── aria_nbv/                    # Python workspace, package code, tests, and scripts
├── docs/                        # Quarto site, Typst paper/slides, bibliography
├── external/                    # Vendor checkouts / shims expected by the workspace
├── scripts/                     # Repo-level helper wrappers and generators
└── Makefile                     # Context, docs, and operator entrypoints
```

## Current package layout

```text
aria_nbv/
├── pyproject.toml / uv.lock     # Packaging and dependency graph
├── main.py                      # Local CLI/bootstrap entrypoint
├── scripts/                     # Context helpers, training helpers, figure export
├── tests/                       # Pytest coverage by subsystem
└── aria_nbv/
    ├── app/                     # Streamlit shell, state, controller, page panels
    ├── configs/                 # PathConfig, W&B, Optuna config surfaces
    ├── data/                    # Download stats and metadata compatibility helpers
    ├── data_handling/           # Typed views, dataset loading, mesh/offline-cache contracts
    ├── interpretability/        # Attribution utilities
    ├── lightning/               # Training loop, datamodule, optimizer orchestration
    ├── pipelines/               # Oracle labeler orchestration
    ├── pose_generation/         # Candidate sampling and pruning rules
    ├── rendering/               # Candidate depth and point-cloud rendering
    ├── rri_metrics/             # Oracle RRI, CORAL, metrics, and binning
    ├── utils/                   # BaseConfig, Console, frames, plotting, schemas
    ├── vin/                     # VINv3 scorer, encoders, and typed outputs
    └── streamlit_app.py         # Streamlit/console entrypoint
```

## High-signal owners

- **App flow**: [`aria_nbv.app.app`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/app.py#L1) wires the UI; [`aria_nbv.app.controller`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/app/controller.py#L1) owns cache-aware stage execution.
- **Data contracts**: [`aria_nbv.data_handling.efm_dataset`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_dataset.py#L1), [`efm_views`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/efm_views.py#L1), and [`mesh_cache`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/data_handling/mesh_cache.py#L1) own live snippet and mesh payloads.
- **Oracle pipeline**: [`aria_nbv.pipelines.oracle_rri_labeler`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/pipelines/oracle_rri_labeler.py#L1) coordinates candidate generation, rendering, point-cloud construction, and RRI scoring.
- **VIN stack**: [`aria_nbv.vin.model_v3`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/model_v3.py#L1), [`aria_nbv.vin.types`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/vin/types.py#L1), and [`aria_nbv.lightning.lit_module`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/aria_nbv/lightning/lit_module.py#L1) own prediction, diagnostics, and training behavior.
- **Context and routing**: [`scripts/nbv_context_index.sh`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/scripts/nbv_context_index.sh), [`scripts/nbv_get_context.sh`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/scripts/nbv_get_context.sh), and [`aria_nbv/scripts/get_context.py`](https://github.com/JanDuchscherer104/NBV/blob/main/aria_nbv/scripts/get_context.py#L1) produce the lightweight discovery artifacts used by agents.

## Verification surfaces

```text
aria_nbv/tests/
├── app/                         # Streamlit panel and state tests
├── data/                        # Legacy compatibility data tests
├── data_handling/               # Dataset, cache, downloader, and contract tests
├── integration/                 # Real-data and end-to-end pipeline tests
├── lightning/                   # Training and scheduler tests
├── pose_generation/             # Candidate sampling and rule tests
├── rendering/                   # Depth renderer and backprojection tests
├── rri_metrics/                 # Metrics, logging, and binning tests
└── vin/                         # VIN core, utilities, and plotting tests
```

## External code and notebooks

```text
external/
├── ATEK/                        # Expected ATEK checkout
├── efm3d/                       # Expected EFM3D checkout
├── openpoints_shim/             # Local shim package tracked in-repo
├── projectaria_tools/           # Expected Project Aria Tools checkout
└── scenescript/                 # Expected SceneScript checkout
```

- Use [Resources & Tools](resources.qmd#resources-tools) for vendor docs and repository links.
- Use the Typst paper and `docs/contents/impl/*.qmd` pages for current internal architecture.
- Keep notebooks as exploratory artifacts, not the source of truth for package behavior.
